title: Rajasthan's Geography Will Surprise You
description:
Rajasthan is not just desert and camels. it’s one of the most geographically diverse states in India. In this video, we explore the real geography of Rajasthan in a simple way: from the Thar Desert and rare wildlife to the ancient Aravalli mountains, rivers, cities, and natural resources.

Did you know the marble used in Ram Mandir and the Taj Mahal comes from Makrana in Rajasthan? Or that the Aravalli Range is one of the oldest fold mountains in the world? We also cover famous cities like Jaipur, Jodhpur, and Udaipur, along with hidden gems like Banswara, plus major rivers like Chambal, Luni, Banas, and Mahi.

Watch till the end and tell us,  which state should we explore next?

#Rajasthan #GeographyOfRajasthan #IndianGeography #TharDesert #AravalliRange #Jaipur #Udaipur #Jodhpur #IndiaExplained #EducationalVideo #IndianStates #TheInformedCitizen
